metadata.description: Local marketplace for Repost-with-agent — a skill-only agent/OpenClaw-compatible plugin that drives the running agent through cross-platform reposting (LinkedIn, X, Bluesky, Threads, Facebook) using its current-harness browser automation. No CLI, no MCP server, no platform SDKs.

plugins.name: repost-with-agent
plugins.description: Skill-only reposting workflow plugin. Skills + slash commands instruct the running agent (OpenClaw via its built-in browser, Claude Code via chrome-devtools-mcp, or another explicit browser adapter) how to scrape a source profile, dedupe against history + destination, expand shortened URLs, post via the user's logged-in browser, append history, and Telegram-confirm Ethan. JSON state lives at ~/.repost-with-agent/. No code on disk performs any of the work — the agent does it all with native tools.
